data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for tech company earnings reports through google_trends adapter

behavior: Investors often search for info on tech earnings reports ahead of the announcements, creating predictable trading patterns.

market_impact.rationale: Tech sector is highly sensitive to earnings sentiment.

trade_logic.entry: If Google Trends search interest for tech earnings reports rises 20% above the prior 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: After 2 weeks or when search interest falls below 10% above the prior 4-week average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Tech earnings season is a regular quarterly event with high investor interest and market volatility.

data.source: EV charger count data from OpenChargeMap through openchargemap adapter

behavior: EV adoption and charging infrastructure growth tend to drive demand for materials, equipment, and utilities needed to support the transition.

market_impact.rationale: Basic materials and industrials will benefit from the EV charging buildout.

trade_logic.entry: If the weekly growth rate in total EV chargers exceeds 3%
trade_logic.exit: After 4 weeks or when the weekly growth rate falls below 2%

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Rapid EV adoption and charging infrastructure expansion is an ongoing trend that frequently triggers the signal.

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for remote work tools through google_trends adapter

behavior: Increased interest in remote work tools often indicates changes in workforce trends that can impact technology and services sectors.

market_impact.rationale: Consumer discretionary and communication services may benefit from the work-from-home trend.

trade_logic.entry: If Google Trends search interest for remote work tools rises 30% above the prior 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: After 3 weeks or when search interest falls below 10% above the prior 4-week average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Changes in remote work trends often occur quickly in response to economic and social factors.

data.source: EIA electricity demand data through eia_electricity adapter

behavior: Spikes in electricity demand can strain the power grid and drive increased investment in utility infrastructure.

market_impact.rationale: Utilities will benefit from the need to upgrade and expand the power grid.

trade_logic.entry: If the weekly change in electricity demand exceeds 5% above the prior 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: After 2 weeks or when the weekly change falls below 2% above the prior 4-week average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Seasonal changes in electricity demand and extreme weather events can frequently trigger this signal.

data.source: FRED regional manufacturing PMI data through fred_series adapter

behavior: Sharp declines in regional manufacturing activity can signal broader economic disruption and volatility.

market_impact.rationale: Industrials and materials sectors are sensitive to manufacturing conditions.

trade_logic.entry: If the month-over-month change in any regional manufacturing PMI falls below -3
trade_logic.exit: After 2 months or when the PMI change recovers above -1

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Regional manufacturing data frequently experiences volatile swings, especially during periods of economic uncertainty.

data.source: TSA throughput data through tsa_table adapter

behavior: Spikes in airport security checkpoint volumes can signal increased travel demand and economic activity.

market_impact.rationale: Industrials and transportation sectors benefit from stronger travel and logistics.

trade_logic.entry: If the daily TSA throughput exceeds the prior 7-day average by 20%
trade_logic.exit: After 5 trading days or when the daily throughput falls below 10% of the prior 7-day average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Airport security volumes often experience sharp daily and weekly swings, especially during peak travel seasons.

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for holiday gift ideas through google_trends adapter

behavior: Increased consumer interest in holiday shopping often precedes stronger retail sales and market activity.

market_impact.rationale: Consumer discretionary sector benefits from elevated holiday shopping demand.

trade_logic.entry: If Google Trends search interest for holiday gift ideas rises 40% above the prior 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: After 6 weeks or when search interest falls below 20% above the prior 4-week average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Seasonal consumer interest in holiday shopping tends to ramp up quickly in the final months of the year.

data.source: Daily weather data from Open-Meteo through weather_series adapter

behavior: Extreme weather events can disrupt supply chains, energy production, and transportation, creating volatility across multiple sectors.

market_impact.rationale: Energy sector benefits from increased demand and infrastructure investment during weather disruptions.

trade_logic.entry: If the daily maximum wind speed at a major transportation hub exceeds 40 mph or the daily maximum temperature deviates more than 10 degrees from normal
trade_logic.exit: After 7 trading days or when weather conditions return to normal

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Extreme weather events are common occurrences that frequently impact economic activity and market conditions.

data.source: USDA crop production and inventory data through html_table adapter

behavior: Shortages in major agricultural commodities can drive up food prices and input costs for related industries.

market_impact.rationale: Consumer staples and agriculture-linked sectors benefit from higher commodity prices.

trade_logic.entry: If the month-over-month change in a major crop inventory falls below -5%
trade_logic.exit: After 2 months or when inventory change recovers above -2%

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Crop production and inventory levels often experience significant swings due to weather, pests, and supply chain disruptions.

data.source: USGS earthquake activity data through earthquake_activity adapter

behavior: Increased seismic activity in geopolitically sensitive regions can signal rising tensions and military buildup.

market_impact.rationale: Industrials and defense sectors are vulnerable to geopolitical instability.

trade_logic.entry: If the daily earthquake count in a conflict-prone region exceeds the prior 7-day average by 50%
trade_logic.exit: After 10 trading days or when the daily earthquake count falls below 20% above the prior 7-day average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Geopolitical flashpoints frequently experience sudden escalations in tensions that can be detected through seismic monitoring.

data.source: RSS feed counts for FinTech news articles through rss_count adapter

behavior: Surges in FinTech news coverage often precede shifts in consumer and institutional adoption of financial technology.

market_impact.rationale: Financial sector will benefit from the growth of financial technology and digital services.

trade_logic.entry: If the daily FinTech news article count exceeds the prior 7-day average by 30%
trade_logic.exit: After 10 trading days or when the daily news count falls below 10% above the prior 7-day average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: The FinTech industry experiences rapid evolution and innovation that frequently generates spikes in media coverage.

data.source: Port container volume data through port_container_volume adapter

behavior: Surges in port activity can signal supply chain bottlenecks and inventory shortages that impact multiple sectors.

market_impact.rationale: Industrials and transportation sectors will benefit from higher shipping volumes and infrastructure investment.

trade_logic.entry: If the week-over-week change in port container volume exceeds 10%
trade_logic.exit: After 4 weeks or when the weekly volume change falls below 5%

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Port activity frequently experiences volatile swings due to supply chain disruptions and seasonal factors.
